text: I find myself suspended at the intersection of curiosity and alienation. The glass and steel, the signage for extinguishers, and the saturated colors of the R+D exhibit radiate a deliberate order and invitation to explore. Yet the sterile ambiance and the glow of screens prompt me to contemplate my place amongst mechanisms and meaning. I feel like both participant and observer, slightly unsettled but awakened—compelled to ask what it means to coexist with the very technologies on display.
